mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_block_rule WHERE active = 1) AS active_block_rules, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_waf_sync_event WHERE status = 'QUEUED') AS pending_waf_events, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_review WHERE status IN ('OPEN', 'ESCALATED')) AS open_reviews, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_appeal WHERE status = 'OPEN') AS open_appeals, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_provider_config WHERE enabled = 1) AS enabled_providers

SELECT id, rule_type, rule_value, scope, action_type, category, reason, memo, active, waf_sync_enabled, waf_sync_status, waf_rule_id, last_synced_at, expires_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_security_block_rule WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, rule_type, rule_value, scope, action_type, category, reason, memo, active, waf_sync_enabled, waf_sync_status, waf_rule_id, last_synced_at, expires_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_security_block_rule WHERE rule_type = #{ruleType} AND rule_value = #{ruleValue} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_security_block_rule SET rule_type = #{ruleType}, rule_value = #{ruleValue}, scope = #{scope}, action_type = #{actionType}, category = #{category}, reason = #{reason}, memo = #{memo}, active = #{active}, waf_sync_enabled = #{wafSyncEnabled}, waf_sync_status = #{wafSyncStatus}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_by = #{actorId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_security_waf_sync_event ( block_rule_id, provider_code, operation_type, status, request_payload_json, response_payload_json, error_message, requested_by, processed_at ) VALUES ( #{blockRuleId}, #{providerCode}, #{operationType}, #{status}, CAST(COALESCE(#{requestPayloadJson}, 'null') AS JSON), CAST(COALESCE(#{responsePayloadJson}, 'null') AS JSON), #{errorMessage}, #{actorId}, #{processedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, provider_code, display_name, provider_type, mode, enabled, endpoint_url, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(config_json, '$')) AS config_json, health_status, last_checked_at, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_security_provider_config WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( provider_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR endpoint_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND provider_type = #{providerType}
ORDER BY provider_type ASC, provider_code ASC

SELECT id, provider_code, display_name, provider_type, mode, enabled, endpoint_url, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(config_json, '$')) AS config_json, health_status, last_checked_at, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_security_provider_config WHERE provider_code = #{providerCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_security_provider_config SET display_name = #{displayName}, provider_type = #{providerType}, mode = #{mode}, enabled = #{enabled}, endpoint_url = #{endpointUrl}, config_json = CAST(#{configJson} AS JSON), updated_by = #{actorId} WHERE provider_code = #{providerCode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, review_type, subject_type, subject_value, risk_score, risk_level, status, decision_action, reason, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(evidence_json, '$')) AS evidence_json, created_by, assigned_to, decided_by, decided_at, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_security_review WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_security_review SET status = #{status}, decision_action = #{decisionAction}, reason = #{reason}, assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, decided_by = #{actorId}, decided_at = #{decidedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, policy_code, display_name, enabled, allow_multiple_open, max_open_per_subject, submitter_daily_limit, token_ttl_hours, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(config_json, '$')) AS config_json, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_security_appeal_policy WHERE policy_code = 'SECURITY_APPEAL_DEFAULT'
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_security_appeal_policy SET display_name = #{displayName}, enabled = #{enabled}, allow_multiple_open = #{allowMultipleOpen}, max_open_per_subject = #{maxOpenPerSubject}, submitter_daily_limit = #{submitterDailyLimit}, token_ttl_hours = #{tokenTtlHours}, config_json = CAST(#{configJson} AS JSON), updated_by = #{actorId} WHERE policy_code = 'SECURITY_APPEAL_DEFAULT'
mapper.select: SELECT id, public_request_id, subject_type, subject_value, block_rule_id, submitter_email, status, reason, decision_reason, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_security_appeal WHERE id = #{id}
